sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁים אשּׁה

Transliteration: 'ishshâh nâshı̂ym

Phonetic: ish-shaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. woman, wife, female
    1. woman (opposite of man)
    2. wife (woman married to a man)
    3. female (of animals)
    4. each, every (pronoun)

Origin: from H376 or H582

TWOT entry: 137a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
